nasb.text: Until an arrow pierces through his liver; As a bird hastens to the snare, So he does not know that it will cost him his life.

esv.text: till an arrow pierces its liver; as a bird rushes into a snare; he does not know that it will cost him his life.

cnv.text: 直到箭矢射透他的肝； 他仿佛飛鳥投入網羅， 並不知道會喪失性命。

ccb.text: 直等到利箭射穿他的肝。 他像只自投网罗的飞鸟， 浑然不知要赔上性命！

csbs.text: 直到箭射穿他的肝脏—— 他就像雀鸟快速进入网罗， 他却不明白，这会赔上自己的性命。
